name: schmug-claude-routines
description: Single-plugin marketplace hosting the cc-routine plugin: event-driven issue-to-PR and optional gated PR-to-merge routines for autonomous Claude Code sessions.

plugins.name: cc-routine
plugins.description: Event-driven routines for GitHub: implementer (issues.opened → focused PR, never merges) and optional merger (pull_request.opened → six-condition fail-closed gate → gh pr merge --auto or one needs-you escalation). Author + label gated, repo-agnostic skills.
